title: Variant Tools and Weaponry - Tools and Swords
description: This mod enables the players to make tools and swords from more materials.
body:
### For both Forge and Fabric
This mod adds 125 new Tools and Swords from over 25 other base and new materials.

#### In game materials:
- Andesite
- Diorite
- Granite
- Cobbled Deepslate
- Obsidian
- Blackstone
- Redstone Block
- Lapis Block
- Endstone
- Magma Block
- Dripstone Block
- Flint
- Bone
- Copper Ingot
- Emerald
- Quartz
- Nether Brick
- Amethyst Shard
- Prismarine Shard

#### New custom materials:
- Wither Bone
- Wither Bone Meal
- Soul Shard
- Soul Spark Dust
- Steel Ingot
- Blaze Gold ingot
- Soul Blaze ingot

#### Upgrade materials:
- Heart of the Sea
- Nether Star



#### Custom Material recipes:

Wither Bone - Wither Skeletons will now have a low chance of dropping Wither Bones that can be used to make Wither Bone Meal and Wither Bone tools and sword.


Wither Bone Meal - Unlike normal Bone Meal this can't be used to grow plants, but instead turns Grass Blocks to Dirt Blocks and Dirt Blocks to Coarse Dirt Blocks. It also has a very small chance to make Wither Rose.
Steel Ingot - Just place the iron ingot back into the furnace and it will start smelting it into steel ingots, but the smelting time is much longer.


Blaze Gold Ingot - Made using 1 Gold Ingot and 4 Blaze Powders, place the Gold Ingot in the middle and than place the 4 Blaze Powders next to it in the form of a plus sign.


Soul Shard - You can make Soul Shard by placing Soul Sand into the furnace, it will start smelting the Soul Sand giving you Soul Shards.


Soul Spark Dust - You can make Soul Spark Dust by combining Soul Shard with Wither Bone Meal.


Soul Blaze Ingot - Made using 1 Blaze Gold Ingot and 4 Soul Spark Dusts, place the Blaze Gold Ingot in the middle and than place the 4 Soul Spark Dusts next to it in the form of a plus sign.



#### Upgrading items:
You can upgrade Netherite and Prismarine tools and sword in the Smithing Table.
Netherite tools and sword can be upgraded with Nether Star into Nether Star tools and sword.
Prismarine tools and sword can be upgraded with Heart of the Sea into Sea tools and sword.



#### Special item effects:
The Sea tools mining speed is not affected underwater and all sea tools and sword deal a small extra damage while underwater.

The Blaze Gold tools and sword will set creatures and players on fire when hitting them.

The Soul Blaze tools and sword will set creatures and players on fire when hitting them and applies the wither status effect.

This mod was mostly done by attila1990

Thanks for downloading this mod!
